Sudoku XL · Legal

Sudoku XL privacy policy

No data collected. No account, no analytics — progress and statistics stay on your device.

Last updated: June 12, 2026

Data we collect

Sudoku XL collects no personal data. Your progress, saved games and statistics are stored only on your device.

Advertising

Sudoku XL contains no third-party advertising networks.

Analytics & tracking

No analytics or tracking SDKs are included.

Accounts

No account or sign-up is required.

Data storage

All data is stored locally on your iPhone. Deleting the app deletes your data.

Additional details

  • Any optional purchases (such as hint credits) are processed entirely by Apple through the App Store.
  • The app makes no network requests and works fully offline.

Children’s privacy

Sudoku XL does not collect personal data from anyone, including children. The app contains no social features, chat or user-generated content shared with others.

Changes to this policy

If a future version of Sudoku XL changes how data is handled — for example by introducing new features — this policy will be updated before that version is released, and the date above will reflect it.

Contact

For privacy questions about Sudoku XL, email support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com . Amsterdam Future Labs · Pieter Thurkow, Amsterdam, The Netherlands.
